creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:58:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    russian/aspell       Makefile 
    russian/eric4        Makefile 
    russian/ksocrat      Makefile 
    russian/muttprint    Makefile 
    russian/xmms         Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +1 -0      ports/russian/aspell/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -0      ports/russian/eric4/Makefile
  1.22      +1 -1      ports/russian/ksocrat/Makefile
  1.8       +1 -1      ports/russian/muttprint/Makefile
  1.9       +1 -0      ports/russian/xmms/Makefile
